issues.description: ARCHITECTURE.md stat() signature omits the 'permissions' field. PRD §2.1 requires stat to return { size, mtime, isDirectory, permissions }. The actual code (src/types.ts) is correct, but the architecture doc is stale.
issues.from_item: PRD §2.1: stat() returns { size, mtime, isDirectory, permissions: Permission }

issues.description: ARCHITECTURE.md auto-selection logic omits SQLite priority. PRD §1.4 specifies SQLite as steps 1-2 (explicit sqliteDb option, then Node.js with better-sqlite3). ARCHITECTURE.md jumps straight to Node.js → NodeFsBackend. The code correctly implements the full 6-step priority.
issues.from_item: PRD §1.4: 1) Explicit sqliteDb → SQLiteBackend, 2) Node.js + better-sqlite3 → SQLiteBackend, 3) Node.js → NodeFsBackend, 4-6) browser/fallback
issues.to_item: ARCHITECTURE.md: 1) Node.js → NodeFsBackend, 2) OPFS, 3) IDB, 4) Fallback — no SQLite steps
